name: Diffract
description: Migrate and run Diffract inside OpenShell with optional NIM-backed inference

blueprintVersion.description: Pinned blueprint artifact version (e.g., '0.1.0'). Omit for latest.

blueprintRegistry.description: OCI registry or GitHub release URL for blueprint artifacts

sandboxName.description: Name for the Diffract sandbox in OpenShell

inferenceProvider.description: Default inference provider type (nvidia, vllm, openai-compatible)
